callback_message: Create an academic year and define terms such as First Term and Final Term. These will be used across programs, assessments, and report cards.
description:
In this step, you will define the academic year and organize it into terms such as First Term, Second Term, or Final Term.

The academic year represents the overall duration of an academic session (for example, 2025–2026), while terms divide the year into smaller periods for better management of exams, assessments, and reporting.

Setting up academic years and terms is essential for structuring your institute’s academic calendar. It allows you to organize programs, schedule assessments, generate report cards, and manage student progression in a systematic way.

Ensure that each academic year is properly defined before proceeding with program creation, enrollments, and assessments.
name: Academic Structure Setup
title: Academic Structure Setup
